language.title: Language & region
language.subtitle: Choose your display language and the currency your amounts are shown in.
language.label: Language
language.currencyHelp: Auto-detected from your POS when connected. All amounts are shown in this currency.

integrations.toastGuidHelp: Find your restaurant GUID in Toast Web under Integrations, then paste it here to sync sales and labor.
integrations.connectHelpLabor: Connect your {{name}} account to automatically sync sales, locations, and labor.
integrations.connectHelpNoLabor: Connect your {{name}} account to automatically sync sales and locations.

taxjar.name: TaxJar
taxjar.blurb: Auto-look-up state & local sales tax rates by ZIP
taxjar.ownerOnly: Only the company owner can manage the TaxJar connection.
taxjar.tokenHelp: Get a token at <1>app.taxjar.com → Account → API Access</1>. Stored encrypted; never shown again.

team.description: Share events, inventory, and recipes with your team. Everyone in the same company sees the same data.

subscription.starterIncludes: Includes 1 finalized event and basic profit summary.

danger.offeredBody: Accepting makes you the owner, with control over billing and the team.
danger.leaveDescription: Remove yourself from {{name}}. You'll lose access until an owner invites you back.
danger.ownerDescription: As the owner you can't leave directly. Transfer the company to another member (they must accept; you'll become a regular member and can then leave), or delete it entirely.

toast.posConnected: ✅ POS connected successfully! Your locations are now available.
toast.posFailed: POS connection failed. Please try again.
toast.confirmDisconnectPos: Disconnect {{name}}? You will need to reconnect to sync sales.
toast.confirmRemoveTaxjar: Disconnect TaxJar? Tax rates will no longer auto-look-up.
toast.inviteRateLimit: Please wait {{count}}s before sending another invite — email sending is rate-limited.
toast.confirmLeave: Leave {{name}}? You'll lose access until you're invited again.
toast.confirmOffer: Offer ownership of {{name}} to {{email}}? It only takes effect once they accept.
toast.ownershipOffered: Ownership offered to {{email}} — awaiting their approval.
toast.confirmAcceptOwnership: Accept ownership of {{name}}? You'll become the owner and take over billing and team management.
toast.confirmDelete: Delete {{name}}? This permanently removes all its events, recipes, inventory, and team. This cannot be undone.
